title: VSCode Extension Epic
reason: Epic/tracking issue. All sub-issues (184-207) have implementations. Extension activates, LSP client starts, commands registered, test controller, tree view, debug adapter all present in extension.js.

title: VSCode Extension Foundation
reason: extension.js has activate/deactivate, LanguageClient setup, serverOptions, clientOptions. package.json has proper contributes section.

title: LSP IDE Workflows: Rename, Code Actions, Formatting
reason: server.rs implements async fn rename(), code_action(), formatting(), range_formatting(). All advertised in ServerCapabilities.

title: Test Runner and VSCode Test Explorer Surface
reason: extension.js has setupTestController() creating vscode.tests.createTestController('arukellt-tests'). 1164-line test file exists.

title: Debug Surface: DAP and Source-Level Debugging
reason: ark-dap/src/lib.rs (968 lines) implements full DAP protocol: launch, setBreakpoints, configurationDone, continue, next, stepIn, stepOut, evaluate, threads, stackTrace, scopes, variables, disconnect.

title: Ark.toml Project/Workspace and Scripts
reason: Extension discovers ark.toml via Manifest::find_root. LSP resolves project roots from workspace folders. extension.js has runScript command.

title: VSCode Extension Package and Language Client Bootstrap
reason: package.json exists with proper metadata. LanguageClient instantiated with TransportKind. ServerOptions configured.

title: VSCode Commands, Tasks, and Status Surfaces
reason: registerCommands() registers 15+ commands. LanguageStatusItem created. Task-related ShellExecution usage present (5 occurrences).

title: VSCode Setup Doctor Command Graph and Environment Inspection
reason: showSetupDoctor, showCommandGraph, showEnvironmentDiff commands all registered and implemented.

title: Intent Completion and Auto-Import Intelligence
reason: get_completions() includes auto-import candidates. completion_includes_auto_import_candidate_for_stdio test exists. use_completions() handles import context.

title: Refactor Search and Workspace Navigation Surface
reason: WorkspaceSymbolParams handler implemented (async fn symbol). document_symbol implemented. goto_definition with cross-file resolution.
missing_evidence: workspace_symbol_provider NOT advertised in ServerCapabilities — handler exists but clients won't discover it. Minor gap.

title: Semantic Preview Diff and Ghost Refactor Surface
reason: No evidence of semantic preview/diff/ghost-refactor UI in extension.js. These are advanced UX features that would need webview panels or decoration APIs.
missing_evidence: No webview panel for semantic diff/preview. No ghost text decoration code. Likely a planning issue marked done prematurely.

title: Partial Execution Preview and Local Semantic Insight
reason: No evidence of partial execution preview in extension.js or LSP. showPipeline command exists but is just a basic output panel.
missing_evidence: No inline execution preview, no local semantic insight beyond standard LSP features.

title: Arukellt Test Discovery Runner and JSON Reporter
reason: Test controller in extension.js discovers and runs tests. CLI 'arukellt test' command invoked.

title: VSCode Test Explorer and Inline Test Execution
reason: createTestController with run profiles exists in extension.js.

title: Advanced Test UX: Impact Analysis, Snapshot Diff, Fuzz UI
reason: No evidence of impact analysis, snapshot diff UI, or fuzz testing UI in extension.js.
missing_evidence: No snapshot diff rendering, no impact analysis, no fuzz UI. These are advanced features with no implementation traces.

title: Debug Metadata and DAP Adapter Foundation
reason: DAP adapter in lib.rs handles initialize, launch, manages session state with source lines, executable lines, breakpoints.

title: Runtime Inspection, Stepping, and Evaluate Surface
reason: DAP implements next, stepIn, stepOut, continue, evaluate, stackTrace, scopes, variables. evaluate_expression function exists.

title: Advanced Debug Intelligence
reason: DAP has basic stepping/evaluate. No evidence of advanced features like conditional breakpoints, watch expressions, data breakpoints, or expression evaluation beyond simple variable lookup.
missing_evidence: evaluate_expression is basic line-based lookup. No conditional breakpoint support. No logpoints. No data breakpoints.

title: Ark.toml Schema and Project/Workspace Discovery
reason: Manifest::find_root used in LSP initialize. discover_workspace_package_roots implemented. Multi-root workspace folder support.

title: Script Run and Script List CLI Surface
reason: arukellt.runScript command registered in extension.js.

title: Project Explain, Build Explain, Script Sandbox Surface
reason: showPipeline exists but is basic. No evidence of build-explain or script-sandbox functionality.
missing_evidence: No sandbox execution environment. explainCode command just shows a toast message.

title: Docs and Codebase Intelligence Surfaces
reason: openDocs command registered but just shows a toast 'Opening documentation for...'. No actual doc rendering.
missing_evidence: openDocs is a stub that shows an informational message. No documentation webview or rendering.

title: Interactive Compiler Pipeline and Inline Profiling
reason: showPipeline command exists but is basic output channel text. No inline profiling decorations.
missing_evidence: No inline profiling annotations. No interactive pipeline visualization. showPipeline is just text output.

title: Extension Security Surface Analysis
reason: securityReview command registered and implemented with actual security review text output.

title: VSCode Sidebar and Project Tree View
reason: setupProjectTreeView() creates vscode.window.createTreeView('arukellt-project') with TreeDataProvider (9 references). refreshProjectTree command.

title: Language Status Item and Observability
reason: LanguageStatusItem created (23 references). Severity levels set based on LSP state.

title: Multi-Root Workspace and Per-Project Config
reason: LSP initialize() iterates workspace_folders, stores all roots. discover_workspace_package_roots handles multiple roots.
